title: loroglossum hircinum subsp. caprinum
intro: Loroglossum hircinum subsp. caprinum is a sub-species of the Loroglossum hircinum plant, commonly known as the goat's beard, a type of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Loroglossum hircinum subsp. caprinum lie in its roots, which contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds with potential antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming the plant can provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Loroglossum hircinum subsp. caprinum can be made in the form of infusions or decoctions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
